prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 211、双一流；软科主榜2026年第82名，近年排名稳定在82–92区间，属全国中上游水平；2025 年声誉偏正面（新闻传播学A++学科排名），2026年声誉偏负面（宿舍火灾等校园安全事件）；抖音热度排名第11位（高热），短视频曝光量大，报考关注度较高。历史投档异常 记录中未见中国传媒大学明显断档信号；新闻传播学A+（全国顶尖），与该校物理类招生的传播学（智能与计算传播方向）、广告学（计算广告双学士学位实验 班）、新闻学（新闻舆论学方向）等专业直接对应，对相关方向考生有较强吸引力。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 新闻传播学大类2023年社会热度为“明显劝退” ，但计算机类、电子信息/通信等工科专业热度持续偏高；该校物理类以数字媒体技术、电子信息工程、通信工程等工科专业为主，受新闻传播学降温影响有限。本省2026年物理 类考生估算约206283人，较2025年192096人增加约7.4%，竞争加剧；中国传媒大学位于北京，对福建省考生有较强跨省吸引力；该校在福建招生占比约3–5%，近年招生人数持续增加，显示对福建生源的重视。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合历年位次持续后移趋势、2026年扩招3人（+8.3%）部分缓解竞争、本省物理 类考生增加约7.4%加剧竞争、抖音高热提升关注度、新闻传播学降温对物理类影响有限等因素，考虑考生规模扩大带来的额外竞争压力， 预测2026年物理类最低位次约13088名，区间12588–13588名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for Physics Category were approximately 5822 → 6504 → 8477 → 11940 → 12436, showing a continuous backward trend, with a cumulative backward shift of about 6614 places in the past 4 years; the 2025 baseline is about 12436, and the backward shift has slowed in the past 2 years (2024 to 2025 only +496 places); the provincial Physics Category enrollment plan was 30 in 2021, 28 in 2022, 26 in 2023, 33 in 2024, and 36 in 2025; the 2026 plan is 39, an increase of 3 (+8.3%) from 2025, marking the third consecutive year of expansion, which somewhat alleviates competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 211, Double First-Class; ranked 82nd in the 2026 Soft Science main ranking, stable in the 82–92 range in recent years, at the upper-middle level nationally; 2025 reputation is relatively positive (Journalism and Communication A++ discipline ranking), 2026 reputation is relatively negative (dormitory fire and other campus safety incidents); Douyin popularity ranking 11th (high heat), with high short video exposure and considerable application attention. No obvious signal of admission gaps in historical abnormal admission records; Journalism and Communication A+ (top nationally), directly corresponding to the university's Physics Category majors such as Communication (Intelligent and Computational Communication direction), Advertising (Computational Advertising Dual Bachelor's Degree Experimental Class), and Journalism (Journalism and Public Opinion direction), strongly attracting candidates in related fields.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: In 2023, the social popularity of the Journalism and Communication major category was 'clearly discouraged', but engineering majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication continued to be highly popular; the university's Physics Category mainly includes engineering majors like Digital Media Technology, Electronic Information Engineering, and Communication Engineering, which are less affected by the cooling of Journalism and Communication. The estimated number of Physics Category candidates in the province in 2026 is about 206,283, an increase of about 7.4% from 192,096 in 2025, intensifying competition; Communication University of China is located in Beijing, which has strong cross-provincial appeal for Fujian candidates; the university's enrollment share in Fujian is about 3–5%, with increasing enrollment numbers in recent years, indicating attention to Fujian students.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the continuous backward trend of historical rankings, the expansion of 3 places (+8.3%) in 2026 partially alleviating competition, the increase of about 7.4% in provincial Physics Category candidates intensifying competition, high Douyin popularity increasing attention, and the limited impact of the cooling of Journalism and Communication on Physics Category, along with additional competitive pressure from the expanded candidate pool, the predicted minimum ranking for Physics Category in 2026 is about 13,088, with a range of 12,588–13,588.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If your ranking is within the predicted range of 12,588–13,588, it is recommended to use Tier 2 as the main choice, Tier 1 for a stretch, and Tier 3 as a safety. If your ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range (e.g., within 12,500), you can focus on aiming for top engineering majors like Digital Media Technology; if your ranking is close to the upper limit (around 13,500), it is advisable to use Tier 3 majors as safety, while also paying attention to admission opportunities from the expansion.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for History Category was approximately 994 → 1179 → 1719 → 2194 → 2018, showing an overall backward trend. After reaching a peak of 2194 in 2024, it slightly recovered to 2018 in 2025 (moving forward by 176 places), with a cumulative backward shift of about 1024 places over the past 5 years. The provincial enrollment plan for History Category was 16 in 2021, 18 in 2022, 18 in 2023, 18 in 2024, and 16 in 2025; the 2026 plan is 16, unchanged from 2025, with no expansion or reduction.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 211, Double First-Class; ranked 82nd in the 2026 Soft Science Main Ranking, stable in recent years; reputation was slightly positive in 2025 (Journalism and Communication A++ discipline ranking), but slightly negative in 2026 (campus safety incidents such as dormitory fires); Douyin popularity ranking 11th (high heat), indicating high application attention. No obvious signal of score gaps in historical History Category admission anomalies; Journalism and Communication A+ (top in the country), directly corresponding to the university's History Category enrollment majors such as Network and New Media, Radio and Television (Audiovisual Communication Direction), Advertising (Brand Direction), Communication (Public Opinion and Social Governance Direction), Journalism, etc., with strong appeal to liberal arts candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: The social popularity of the Journalism and Communication major category in 2023 was 'clearly discouraged', with public opinion figures like Zhang Xuefeng continuously bearish on journalism majors, potentially suppressing application enthusiasm. The estimated number of History Category candidates in the province for 2026 is about 61,617, an increase of about 2.3% from 60,252 in 2025, slightly intensifying competition; Communication University of China is located in Beijing, with strong cross-provincial appeal to Fujian liberal arts candidates; the university's enrollment share in Fujian is about 3–5%.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the historical ranking fluctuation trend (slight recovery in 2025), unchanged enrollment plan for 2026, slight increase in provincial History Category candidates, coexistence of A+ discipline advantage in Journalism and Communication and 'clearly discouraged' public opinion, and high Douyin popularity boosting attention, along with the impact of expanded candidate pool and divided public opinion, the predicted minimum ranking for History Category in 2026 is about 2048, with a range of 1679–2417.
